<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>崂山道士 - 文字冒险游戏</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :root {
            --bg-dark: #1a2f1a;
            --bg-light: #f5f0e1;
            --accent-red: #8b2323;
            --accent-gold: #c9a227;
            --text-dark: #2a2a2a;
            --text-light: #f5f0e1;
        }

        body {
            font-family: "楷体", "SimKai", "STKaiti", serif;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 20px;
            background-image: 
                radial-gradient(ellipse at top, #2a4a2a 0%, transparent 50%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse at bottom, #1a2f1a 0%, #0d1a0d 100%);
        }

        .game-container {
            max-width: 800px;
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-light);
            border-radius: 8px;
            box-shadow: 
                0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),
                inset 0 0 100px rgba(139, 35, 35, 0.05);
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 3px solid var(--accent-gold);
        }

        .header {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent-red) 0%, #5a1515 100%);
            color: var(--accent-gold);
            padding: 25px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: 3px solid var(--accent-gold);
            position: relative;
        }

        .header::before {
            content: "◆";
            position: absolute;
            left: 20px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            font-size: 20px;
        }

        .header::after {
            content: "◆";
            position: absolute;
            right: 20px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            font-size: 20px;
        }

        .header h1 {
            font-size: 2.2em;
            letter-spacing: 8px;
            text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            font-weight: normal;
        }

        .chapter-title {
            font-size: 1em;
            color: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.8);
            margin-top: 8px;
            letter-spacing: 4px;
        }

        .story-content {
            padding: 30px;
            min-height: 300px;
            max-height: 400px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            line-height: 2;
            font-size: 1.15em;
            color: var(--text-dark);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c9a8;
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: #e8e0c8;
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: var(--accent-gold);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        .story-text {
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            text-indent: 2em;
        }

        .cursor {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 2px;
            height: 1.2em;
            background: var(--accent-red);
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
            vertical-align: text-bottom;
        }

        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 50% { opacity: 1; }
            51%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        .options-container {
            padding: 25px 30px;
            background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.1);
            border-bottom: 1px solid #d4c9a8;
        }

        .options-label {
            font-size: 0.9em;
            color: var(--accent-red);
            margin-bottom: 15px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
        }

        .options {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .option-btn {
            padding: 15px 25px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #faf6ed 0%, #e8e0c8 100%);
            border: 2px solid var(--accent-gold);
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1.05em;
            color: var(--text-dark);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            text-align: left;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .option-btn::before {
            content: "◇";
            margin-right: 12px;
            color: var(--accent-red);
        }

        .option-btn:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent-gold) 0%, #a68520 100%);
            color: white;
            transform: translateX(5px);
            box-shadow: 3px 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
        }

        .option-btn:hover::before {
            content: "◆";
        }

        .controls {
            padding: 20px 30px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: cent
